LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT HAS CARRIED ITS BURDEN OF SHOWING THE ALLEGED CONDUCT IN PLAINTIFF'S FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT ARISES FROM PROTECTED ACTIVITY UNDER CCP 425.16(E). PLAINTIFF HAS NOT DEMONSTRATED A PROBABILITY OF PREVAILING ON THE MERITS BECAUSE HE FAILS TO PRODUCE PRIMA FACIE EVIDENCE SUPPORTING HIS DEFAMATION CLAIM. (CCP 425.15(B)(1).) Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Attorneys' Fees Following Grant Of Special Motion To Strike
Off Calendar Mar-26-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Patrick Missud, 415.584.7251, plaintiff in propria persona.
Danielle Lee, Assistant General Counsel, 415.538.2517, for defendant State Bar of California.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA'S Motion For Attorneys' Fees Following Grant Of Special Motion To Strike is granted. On January 16, 2014, the Court granted Defendant's Anti-SLAPP motion. Pursuant to CCP sec. 425.16(c), Plaintiff shall pay Defendant reasonable attorney's fees and costs in the amount of $ 10,705.00. Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR5976

Off Calendar Jan-16-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: PATRICK MISSUD, 415.584.7251, PLAINTIFF IN PROPRIA PERSONA.
DANIELLE LEE, ASSISTANT GENERAL COUNSEL, 415.538.2517, FOR DEFENDANT STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA.

DEFENDANT STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is taken off calendar in light of the Court's ruling on Defendant's special motion to strike. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185

MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-16-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: PATRICK MISSUD, 415.584.7251, PLAINTIFF IN PROPRIA PERSONA.
DANIELLE LEE, ASSISTANT GENERAL COUNSEL, 415.538.2517, FOR DEFENDANT STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: DEFENDANT STATE BAR OF CALIFORNIA's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT is Granted. Defendant's request for judicial notice is granted. Defendant has carried its burden of showing the alleged conduct in Plaintiff's First Amended Complaint arises from protected activity under CCP 425.16(e). Plaintiff has not demonstrated a probability of prevailing on the merits because he fails to produce prima facie evidence supporting his defamation claim. (CCP 425.15(b)(1).) Order signed in open court. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185
